name: com.fidensa/mcp-server
description: Fidensa AI certification authority. Check trust scores, search certified capabilities, compare side-by-side, verify signed artifacts, check file integrity, and report runtime experience for MCP servers, skills, rules files, hooks, sub-agents, and plugins.

environmentVariables.name: FIDENSA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for full access (get_contract, compare_capabilities, verify_artifact). Free registration at https://fidensa.com/v1/keys. Not required for check_certification, search_capabilities, verify_file, or report_experience.
